en: I am living in Bangalore since 2003
ko: I am living in Bangalore since 2003

en: We use since to talk about when an activity or situation began For example
ko: since는 활동이나 상황이 시작된 시점을 말할 때 써. 예를 들면

en: I've worked at the BBC since 2024 I've been working at the BBC since 2024
Did you notice that I used the present perfect for both of these sentences That's because although the action
ko: 두 문장 모두 현재완료를 썼다는 거 눈치챘어? 행동이

en: started in 2024 the situation is still true now We can use the present
perfect simple which is subject plus have plus past participle For example
ko: 단순형은 주어 + have + 과거분사야. 예를 들면

en: I've played the guitar since I was a teenager
Or the present perfect continuous which is subject plus have plus been
plus the ing form of the verb For example You have been learning English since 2015
ko: + 동사의 ing형이야. 예를 들면 2015년부터 영어를 배워오고 있어

en: If the speaker is still living in Bangalore now they should use the present perfect either
ko: 화자가 아직 방갈로르에 살고 있다면 현재완료를 써야 해

en: the present perfect simple or continuous So let's fix that sentence
ko: 현재완료 단순형이든 진행형이든. 그럼 문장을 고치자

en: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003
ko: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003

en: Or I have been living in Bangalore since 2003 What's the difference between the present
ko: 또는 I have been living in Bangalore since 2003. 현재완료 단순형과

en: perfect simple and the present perfect continuous Visit our website to find out
